replicateEverything 0.3.0

Run one replication with a per-object time limit

Source: R/audit_everything.R
audit_run_one.Rd

Run one replication with a per-object time limit

Usage

audit_run_one(
  doi,
  what,
  patience = 20,
  install_deps = FALSE,
  repo = NULL,
  folder = NULL
)

Arguments

doi

Character. DOI of the paper.

what

Character. Replication identifier (e.g., "fig_1").

patience

Seconds before halting the run (default 20).

install_deps

Logical. Install missing CRAN dependencies when TRUE. Defaults to FALSE.

repo

Optional repository slug.

folder

Optional registry folder name from index.csv.

Value

List with success, seconds, timed_out, and error.

On this page
